query:
SELECT 
  t.name AS time_nome,
  t.lodge AS time_loja,
  p.name AS jogador_nome,
  p.position AS posicao,
  p.number AS numero
FROM teams t
LEFT JOIN players p ON p.teamId = t.id
WHERE t.campaignId = (SELECT id FROM campaigns WHERE slug = 'futebolfraterno2026')
ORDER BY t.name, p.name;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4BVDFYYBjXPHJtC.709074b71e30 --database EvJULGQoHRNqTu98ru5T2m --execute 
SELECT 
  t.name AS time_nome,
  t.lodge AS time_loja,
  p.name AS jogador_nome,
  p.position AS posicao,
  p.number AS numero
FROM teams t
LEFT JOIN players p ON p.teamId = t.id
WHERE t.campaignId = (SELECT id FROM campaigns WHERE slug = 'futebolfraterno2026')
ORDER BY t.name, p.name;
